subcodes.first_line: O thou near servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy detailed letter was received and carefully considered, regarding His Honor Haji [3.5s]... ...O Divine Providence! Perplexing difficulties have arisen and formidable obstacles have appeared
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب جمال مبارک نامه مفصل رسید و بدقت ملاحظه گردید در خصوص جناب حاجی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @business; financial; property matters, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @consolation and comfort
